template: {shot_type}{angle}. {scene}. The background of this video is transparent. Realistic style.

hair_motion.description: Fine/moving hair — sub-pixel strands + motion blur
modifiers: with a tight bun of coily hair

sheer_fabric_motion.description: Semi-transparent fabrics in motion — partial alpha + dynamics

cape_cloak_motion.description: Capes, cloaks, robes in motion — opaque flowing fabric edges
